DEPT 03. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. CSR: MARILYN NORMAN. CLERK: G. SHULL. C/C FOR TRIAL BY JURY.ALL PARTIES PRESENT; DEFT IN PRO-PER. COURT STRIKES JURY ON PLTFF MOT DUE TO INSUFFICIEN- CY OF DEFT'S SUBMITTED PROPOSED JURY INSTRUCTIONS. CASE PROCEEDS BY COURT TRIAL. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS PRESENTED. ORAL ARGUMENT BY PLTFF. UPON CONCLUSION OF TRIAL, COURT REQUESTS PROPOSED JUDGMENTS FROM BOTH PARTIES. COURT RULES IN FAVOR OF PLTFF FOR POSSESSION & COSTS, JUDGMENT SIGNED.
